arts.ttl: Hansi Flick set to rotate Barça side for Leganés clash
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has already alerted Barça fans that he expects to shuffle his team for Sunday’s match against Leganés at Montjuïc (9pm). Iñaki Peña will start in goal again as Szczęsny still waits patiently to make his Barça debut.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres wants to be Barcelona’s ‘new Lewandowski’ over Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Hojlund netted two late goals as Man Utd completed a comeback against Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League on Thursday night, and Hargreaves has suggested that the Dane could become Amorim’s very own Gyokeres at Old Trafford. The 26-year-old Swedish striker has 25 goals in 24 games in all competitions.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s possible third kit for 2025-26 season leaked
arts.sum: Barcelona kit leaks appear on a fairly regular basis on social media, with the latest update offering fans an idea of what the club’s third kit for next season might look like. We’ve already seen leaks of the proposed home kit for next season, which shows thick Blaugrana stripes and a graduated design .
